# mihari_status_page (Data Source)

Reads a single Mihari status page by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mihari_status_page" "example" {
  id = "existing-status-page-uuid"
}

output "status_page_subdomain" {
  value = data.mihari_status_page.example.subdomain
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID of the status page.

### Read-Only

- `company_name` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `custom_domain` (String)
- `ip_allowlist` (List of String)
- `ip_allowlist_enabled` (Boolean)
- `password_protection_enabled` (Boolean)
- `sections` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections))
- `subdomain` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--sections"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `resources` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections--resources))

<a id="nestedatt--sections--resources"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections.resources`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `resource_id` (String)
- `resource_type` (String)
- `title` (String)
